name: lib-first-to-answer
caption:
First to answer wins the job. Always has.

The customer rings three trades. The one who picks up first gets the work — not the cheapest, not the best, the fastest to answer.

Free missed-call audit — link in bio. 👇

#plumber #electrician #tradesbusiness #ukandireland #missedcalls
